rationale: Elec. Code §254.096 governs campaign finance reporting for officeholders who become candidates. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: An officeholder who becomes a candidate is subject to Subchapter C during each period covered by a report required to be filed under Subchapter C.
_note: No conflict; the cited election code provision is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
